GitHub

Level 2 API

This page lists the documented shared functions used by the Level 2 workflow.

Core Algorithms

Level2Core — Module
Level2Core

Core algorithms for Level 2 within-window UQ analysis.

This module turns one window's joint PREDICT permeability library into a Level 2 state object. It provides local rank transforms, physical-space distance construction, k-medoids joint clustering, low/high state-library selection, medoid selection, and local/state-wide perturbation pools.

source
Main.Level2Core.assign_to_medoids — Method
assign_to_medoids(distance_matrix, medoids)

Assign every sample to the nearest current medoid.

source
Main.Level2Core.average_silhouette — Method
average_silhouette(distance_matrix, assignments, k)

Compute the average silhouette score for a clustering on a distance matrix.

source
Main.Level2Core.build_distance_matrix — Method
build_distance_matrix(log_perms, local_normal_scores, config)

Build the pairwise distance matrix and distance metadata used for clustering, medoids, and perturbation pools.

The default log_unit metric uses physical log10(k) values directly. The local_normal metric is retained only as a sensitivity option.

source
Main.Level2Core.build_state_libraries — Method
build_state_libraries(joint_rank_score, assignments, config)

Construct low and high state libraries with cluster-aware target-mass selection.

For multi-cluster windows, extreme ordered clusters are included first and only the needed part of a boundary cluster is added to reach the target state fraction.

source
Main.Level2Core.build_window_state — Method
build_window_state(log_perms, raw_perms, window, source_path, source_label, config)

Build one complete Level 2 window-state object.

The returned dictionary is the canonical MAT schema used by downstream table, plotting, validation, and sampling scripts. Clustering is performed using the configured distance metric, while low/high ordering is based on the local-rank joint rank score.

source
Main.Level2Core.choose_clustering — Method
choose_clustering(distance_matrix, joint_rank_score, config, window)

Select the joint permeability clustering for one window.

The function tries K = 2:max_k, rejects clusterings with too-small clusters, chooses the valid K with the highest average silhouette, and falls back to a single-cluster state if no valid multi-cluster solution is sufficiently separated.

source
Main.Level2Core.choose_medoid — Method
choose_medoid(indices, distance_matrix)

Choose the index with minimum total distance to all other candidate indices.

source
Main.Level2Core.cluster_joint_rank_medians — Method
cluster_joint_rank_medians(joint_rank_score, assignments, k)

Compute each cluster's median joint rank score for low-to-high ordering.

source
Main.Level2Core.cluster_score_medians — Method
cluster_score_medians(state_score, assignments, k)

Backward-compatible alias for cluster_joint_rank_medians.

source
Main.Level2Core.compare_window_states — Method
compare_window_states(reference_state, holdout_state)

Compute stability metrics between a reference Level 2 state and a holdout state built from another repeat library.

source
Main.Level2Core.compute_joint_rank_score — Method
compute_joint_rank_score(local_ranks, weights)

Compute the weighted average local rank across kxx, kyy, and kzz.

This score is used only for low-to-high ordering and state-library construction; it is not the clustering distance.

source
Main.Level2Core.compute_local_normal_scores — Method
compute_local_normal_scores(local_ranks)

Transform local percentile ranks to normal scores with the inverse standard normal CDF.

source
Main.Level2Core.compute_local_ranks — Method
compute_local_ranks(log_perms)

Compute component-wise empirical percentile ranks within one window.

Each column of log_perms is ranked independently, so the output describes whether each realization is locally low or high for kxx, kyy, and kzz.

source
Main.Level2Core.compute_state_score — Method
compute_state_score(local_ranks, weights)

Backward-compatible alias for compute_joint_rank_score.

source
Main.Level2Core.counts_from_assignments — Method
counts_from_assignments(assignments, k)

Count the number of samples assigned to each cluster id.

source
Main.Level2Core.empirical_percentile_ranks — Method
empirical_percentile_ranks(x)

Return tie-aware empirical percentile ranks in (0, 1) for one vector.

source
Main.Level2Core.fit_kmedoids — Method
fit_kmedoids(distance_matrix, k, seed_base, num_restarts, max_iter)

Fit k-medoids to a precomputed distance matrix using deterministic restarts.

source
Main.Level2Core.init_medoids — Method
init_medoids(distance_matrix, k, rng)

Initialize k-medoids using a farthest-first strategy after a random first medoid.

source
Main.Level2Core.inv_norm_cdf — Method
inv_norm_cdf(p)

Approximate the inverse standard normal cumulative distribution function.

source
Main.Level2Core.local_pool_indices — Method
local_pool_indices(target_index, candidates, distance_matrix, fraction, min_count)

Select the nearest samples to a state medoid within the cluster-preserving candidate set.

source
Main.Level2Core.mean_vector — Method
mean_vector(values, indices)

Return the component-wise mean vector over selected rows.

source
Main.Level2Core.pairwise_euclidean — Method
pairwise_euclidean(z)

Compute a full pairwise Euclidean distance matrix for feature rows.

source
Main.Level2Core.select_cluster_aware_state — Method
select_cluster_aware_state(cluster_order, assignments, joint_rank_score, n_target; descending=false, excluded=Set())

Select samples from ordered clusters until the requested target count is met.

source
Main.Level2Core.state_record — Method
state_record(label, indices, joint_rank_score, distance_matrix, cluster_assignments, config; descending=false)

Summarize one low/high state library with ordered indices, medoid, and perturbation pools.

source
Main.Level2Core.total_kmedoids_cost — Method
total_kmedoids_cost(distance_matrix, assignments, medoids)

Return the total within-cluster distance to assigned medoids.

source
Main.Level2Core.update_medoids — Method
update_medoids(distance_matrix, assignments, k)

Update each cluster's medoid by minimizing within-cluster total distance.

source
Main.Level2Core.weighted_features — Method
weighted_features(values, scales, weights)

Scale and weight component columns before pairwise distance calculation.

source
Main.Level2Core.window_seed_offset — Method
window_seed_offset(window)

Create a deterministic per-window seed offset for k-medoids restarts.

source

Input and Output

Level2IO — Module
Level2IO

Input/output utilities for the Level 2 UQ workflow.

This module resolves repository-relative paths, reads TOML/CSV configuration files, loads PREDICT MAT libraries, saves Level 2 state objects, and writes CSV/text outputs used by review and sampling scripts.

source
Main.Level2IO.csv_escape — Method
csv_escape(value)

Escape one string field for CSV output.

source
Main.Level2IO.default_config_path — Method
default_config_path()

Return the default Level 2 analysis TOML configuration path.

source
Main.Level2IO.default_level2_output_root — Method
default_level2_output_root()

Return the default folder for Level 2 outputs inside the workflow tree.

source
Main.Level2IO.default_manifest_path — Method
default_manifest_path()

Return the default proxy manifest CSV path.

source
Main.Level2IO.float_string — Method
float_string(value)

Format a real value for compact CSV output.

source
Main.Level2IO.load_proxy_library — Method
load_proxy_library(row)

Load one PREDICT MAT library from a manifest row.

The MAT file must contain a positive perms matrix with columns kxx, kyy, and kzz. The returned dictionary includes both raw permeability and log10(k) values.

source
Main.Level2IO.load_window_state — Method
load_window_state(path)

Load a saved Level 2 window-state MAT file.

source
Main.Level2IO.read_level2_config — Method
read_level2_config(path)

Read and validate the baseline Level 2 TOML configuration.

The returned dictionary normalizes types, validates the six fixed windows, and fills optional plotting/validation settings with defaults.

source
Main.Level2IO.read_manifest_csv — Method
read_manifest_csv(path, cfg)

Read the Level 2 proxy manifest and return rows ordered by the six fixed windows.

Each row gains a resolved_mat_path field so downstream loaders do not need to repeat path resolution.

source
Main.Level2IO.resolve_repo_path — Method
resolve_repo_path(path)

Resolve a repository-relative path against REPO_ROOT; absolute paths are normalized and returned unchanged.

source
Main.Level2IO.save_window_state — Method
save_window_state(path, state)

Save a Level 2 window-state dictionary to a MAT file, creating parent folders as needed.

source
Main.Level2IO.timestamp_string — Method
timestamp_string()

Return an ISO-like local timestamp string for reports.

source
Main.Level2IO.to_float_vector — Method
to_float_vector(values)

Convert scalar or array-like values loaded from MAT files to a vector of floating-point values.

source
Main.Level2IO.to_int_vector — Method
to_int_vector(values)

Convert scalar or array-like values loaded from MAT files to a vector of integers.

source
Main.Level2IO.write_csv — Method
write_csv(path, header, rows)

Write a simple CSV file with escaping for commas and quotation marks.

source
Main.Level2IO.write_text_lines — Method
write_text_lines(path, lines)

Write a plain-text report from a vector of lines.

source
Main.Level2IO.write_window_point_table — Method
write_window_point_table(path, state)

Write one row per PREDICT realization with log permeability, local ranks, normal scores, joint rank score, cluster id, and low/high state indicators.

source

Plotting Helpers

Level2Plotting — Module
Level2Plotting

Shared plotting and table-reading helpers for Level 2 review scripts.

The module centralizes component labels, state colors, cluster colors, MAT value conversion helpers, PCA projection, cluster-order utilities, and simple CSV readers used by the figure scripts.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.activate_plot_theme! — Method
activate_plot_theme!()

Activate CairoMakie and set the default Level 2 plotting theme.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.cluster_rank_assignments — Method
cluster_rank_assignments(state)

Map original cluster ids to ordered cluster numbers for every sample.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.csv_numeric_column — Method
csv_numeric_column(table, name)

Extract and parse one numeric column from a table returned by read_simple_csv.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.csv_string_column — Method
csv_string_column(table, name)

Extract one string column from a table returned by read_simple_csv.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.float_scalar — Method
float_scalar(value)

Convert a scalar or array-like MAT-loaded value to Float64.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.int_scalar — Method
int_scalar(value)

Convert a scalar or array-like MAT-loaded value to Int.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.joint_rank_score_range — Method
joint_rank_score_range(state, label)

Return minimum, median, and maximum joint rank score within a low/high state.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.matrix_float — Method
matrix_float(values)

Convert array-like MAT-loaded values to a Matrix{Float64}.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.medoid_component_values — Method
medoid_component_values(state, label)

Return the log10(k) component vector for a state's medoid realization.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.metric_label — Method
metric_label(name)

Return a readable label for validation and diagnostic metric names.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.ordered_cluster_joint_rank_medians — Method
ordered_cluster_joint_rank_medians(state)

Return cluster median joint rank scores in ordered-cluster order.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.ordered_cluster_score_medians — Method
ordered_cluster_score_medians(state)

Backward-compatible alias for ordered_cluster_joint_rank_medians.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.ordered_cluster_sizes — Method
ordered_cluster_sizes(state)

Return cluster sizes in low-to-high ordered-cluster order.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.parse_csv_line — Method
parse_csv_line(line)

Split one CSV line while respecting quoted fields.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.pca_projection — Method
pca_projection(z)

Project rows of z onto the first two principal-component axes and return both coordinates and explained-variance fractions.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.perturbation_pool_distance_profile — Method
perturbation_pool_distance_profile(state, label, pool)

Return sorted distances from a state medoid to all samples in a perturbation pool.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.read_simple_csv — Method
read_simple_csv(path)

Read a simple CSV file into (header, rows) without external dependencies.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.sample_indices — Method
sample_indices(n, max_points, seed)

Return deterministic sample indices for plotting at most max_points rows.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.state_component_summary — Method
state_component_summary(state, label)

Return component-wise medians and interquartile ranges for a low/high state.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.state_distance_features — Method
state_distance_features(state)

Reconstruct the feature matrix used for Level 2 distance-based diagnostics.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.state_mean_matrix — Method
state_mean_matrix(state)

Return a two-row matrix of low/high mean log10(k) vectors.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.state_score_range — Method
state_score_range(state, label)

Backward-compatible alias for joint_rank_score_range.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.vector_float — Method
vector_float(values)

Convert scalar or array-like MAT-loaded values to a vector of floats.

source
Main.Level2Plotting.vector_int — Method
vector_int(values)

Convert scalar or array-like MAT-loaded values to a vector of integers.

source

Sampling Helpers

Level2Selection — Module
Level2Selection

Selection utilities for converting Level 2 state objects into actual sampled window realizations.

The module supports two sampling modes: state-conditioned sampling from low/high local or state-wide pools, and independent sampling from the full window library. Every selected result is one actual joint PREDICT realization.

source
Main.Level2Selection.default_selection_design — Method
default_selection_design(windows)

Create a small smoke-test design that samples low/high local, low/high state-wide, and independent cases for every fixed window.

source
Main.Level2Selection.design_rows_to_csv_rows — Method
design_rows_to_csv_rows(rows)

Convert selection-design dictionaries to CSV rows using the standard header.

source
Main.Level2Selection.format_result_value — Method
format_result_value(value)

Format one value for the selection-results CSV.

source
Main.Level2Selection.matrix_float — Method
matrix_float(values)

Convert array-like values loaded from MAT files to a Matrix{Float64}.

source
Main.Level2Selection.normalize_mode — Method
normalize_mode(mode)

Normalize user-facing aliases to state or independent.

source
Main.Level2Selection.normalize_optional — Method
normalize_optional(value)

Normalize blank-like optional CSV fields to the empty string.

source
Main.Level2Selection.read_selection_design_csv — Method
read_selection_design_csv(path)

Read a user-provided Level 2 selection design CSV.

Required columns are case_id, window, mode, state_label, and perturbation_pool.

source
Main.Level2Selection.required_field — Method
required_field(row, key)

Read a required CSV field and throw a clear error if it is missing.

source
Main.Level2Selection.select_one_window_sample — Method
select_one_window_sample(state, request, rng, draw_order, random_seed)

Draw one actual realization from the pool requested by a single design row.

source
Main.Level2Selection.select_window_samples — Method
select_window_samples(states, design_rows; random_seed)

Execute a Level 2 selection design against loaded window-state objects.

The returned rows include selected sample indices, log permeability values, raw permeability values, and source-pool metadata.

source
Main.Level2Selection.selection_pool_indices — Method
selection_pool_indices(state, mode, state_label, perturbation_pool)

Return the sample indices and source-pool name for one sampling request.

source
Main.Level2Selection.selection_results_to_csv_rows — Method
selection_results_to_csv_rows(results)

Convert selection result dictionaries to rows using SELECTION_RESULT_HEADER.

source
Main.Level2Selection.split_csv_line — Method
split_csv_line(line)

Split a CSV row while respecting quoted fields.

source
Main.Level2Selection.vector_int — Method
vector_int(values)

Convert scalar or array-like values loaded from MAT files to an integer vector.

source
